OUR STORY Built by makers. For makers. ARTITECT MACHINERY was founded in a small workshop by engineers who believed that every bend should be perfect — not just the first one, but the thousandth. Today, our double folders and sheet metal folding machines are trusted by fabricators, aerospace suppliers, and architectural metalworkers across four continents. 16 Years of precision 1,200+ Machines delivered 38 Countries served OUR PROMISE Every machine we ship is tested to 0.1° accuracy. If it doesn't meet our standard, it never leaves our floor. precision metal workshop craftsmen
